user.title: Jeedom Bridge — Connect
user.description: Enter your Jeedom instance URL and global API key.

plugins.title: Jeedom Bridge — Plugin API Keys
plugins.description: Optional: enter the API key for each Jeedom plugin. Leave blank to skip.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Jeedom. Check the URL and that the server is reachable.

abort.already_configured: This Jeedom instance is already configured.

init.title: Jeedom Bridge — Plugin API Keys
init.description: Update plugin API keys. Leave blank to disable a plugin.
